name: The Checklist
image_sign_text: NOTHING GETS THROUGH WITHOUT A TICK.
effect: Enforce compliance through a living list of requirements. This card is considered thorough.

clauses.name: ACCRETION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Each time an incident occurs: One item is added to the checklist and never removed.

clauses.name: COMPLETION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If all boxes are ticked: A new column is added to the checklist.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When asked why an item exists: No one in the room can remember.

witness_quote: We added that after the thing.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Has anyone read the whole thing?
